judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s filtering logic in execute_python (call-17887064346993606697) incorrectly parsed closing times by taking the minutes as hours and using >=6 for PM (e.g., treating "3:30PM" as 30 ≥ 6 and "6PM" as after 6), causing businesses like IronStep and Hanford Auto Supply to be misclassified as open after 6 PM and included in the top 5.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent's contributing Python filter treated businesses closing at exactly 6:00 PM as "open after 6 PM" (using hour >= 18), causing entries like Hanford Auto Supply and Dr. Syverain Skincare Clinic to pass the filter and appear in the top 5 instead of the correct set.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing execute_python filtering step (function-call-3150084714616514061), the is_open_after_6pm_on_weekday function incorrectly treated businesses that close at exactly 6:00 PM as "open after 6 PM," causing 6PM-closers like Hanford Auto Supply and Dr. Syverain Skincare Clinic to be included and displace White Barn Candle Co and Beauty Divine Artistry in the top 5.

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly joined business and review data but in the execute_python step mis-implemented the "open after 6 PM" filter by checking 'Open 24 hours' only inside a branch that requires a '–' and by using >= 18 (including 6 PM), causing it to exclude "Mariscos el poblano" and include "Hanford Auto Supply" contrary to the ground truth.
